'''Alpha Squad''' was a scout squad for the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]]. Their final mission was to scout the area of [[Felucia/Legends|Felucia]] while [[Tyber Zann]] attempted to [[Battle of Felucia (Zann Consortium)|steal]] a [[Sith holocron/Legends|Sith holocron]] from [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]]. They wandered through several [[Felucian spore plant]]s and died several [[Standard second|seconds]] later.
